Getting Started

Build and use Components FantasyUI through the repository Docker wrapper.

Container-first build

./build-components-fantasyui.sh
./build-components-fantasyui.sh npm run docs:build

Use assets

<link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/components-fantasyui.min.css">
<script src="/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js"></script>
<script type="module" src="/js/components.js"></script>
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
